heading: Department of the Navy: seal
label: 8012 Department of the Navy: seal
text: The Secretary of the Navy shall have a seal for the Department of the Navy. The design of the seal must be approved by the President. Judicial notice shall be taken of the seal.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 8012 was renumbered .section 9012 of this titleAnother prior section 8012 was renumbered and subsequently repealed.section 8013 of this title
